title: Mononoke Hospital
original_title: いんらん百物語 喜悦絶叫！
overview: In an abandoned hospital known for being haunted, paranormal researcher Misawa gathers a group of men to listen to their experiences with supernatural phenomena. Hoping to summon forth a certain ghost, Misawa sets out to gather 100 ghost stories…

trailers.title: 映画『ものの怪病院』予告編
